en: Isabella wasn't happy, and she... Of course she's unhappy.
ko: Isabella wasn't happy, and she... Of course she's unhappy.

en: You ruined her proposal. No, no. She needed me to ruin her proposal, and then we did all this,
ko: You ruined her proposal. No, no. She needed me to ruin her proposal, and then we did all this,

en: and the candle burned brighter, and the cracks... Mirabel. That's why I'm in the vision.
ko: and the candle burned brighter, and the cracks... Mirabel. That's why I'm in the vision.

en: I'm saving the miracle. You have to stop, Mirabel.
ko: I'm saving the miracle. You have to stop, Mirabel.

en: Bruno left because of you. Luisa's losing her powers.
ko: Bruno left because of you. Luisa's losing her powers.

en: Isabella's out of control because of you.
ko: Isabella's out of control because of you.

en: I don't know why you weren't given a gift, but it is not an excuse for you
ko: I don't know why you weren't given a gift, but it is not an excuse for you

en: to hurt this family. I'm sorry.
ko: to hurt this family. I'm sorry.

en: I will never be good enough for you.
ko: I will never be good enough for you.

en: No matter how hard I try.
ko: No matter how hard I try.
